annotations.agentregistry.googleapis.com/description: PII sanitizer for autonomous AI agents — redacts PII before it reaches LLMs. EU AI Act compliant.

spec.description: Redacts emails, phone numbers, national IDs, private keys, financial data from text before LLMs. EN/ES(LA)/PT. EU AI Act Art.4/13 compliant with immutable sanitization hash. Pay-per-call $0.01 USDC on Base/Solana via x402, or 149 USDC prepaid bundle. AP2-compatible.
